Title: User Registration
Preconditions: User is on the registration page.
Test Data: Valid email, password, and confirm password.
Test Steps:
1. Enter a valid email address in the email field.
2. Enter a valid password in the password field.
3. Confirm the password in the confirm password field.
4. Click the register button.
Expected Result: User is registered successfully and redirected to the login page with a success message displayed.

Title: Invalid Email during Registration
Preconditions: User is on the registration page.
Test Steps:
1. Enter an invalid email address in the email field.
2. Enter a valid password in the password field.
3. Confirm the password in the confirm password field.
4. Click the register button.
Expected Result: Error message displayed indicating an invalid email format.

Title: Password Mismatch during Registration
Preconditions: User is on the registration page.
Test Data: Valid email, different passwords in the password and confirm password fields.
Test Steps:
1. Enter a valid email address in the email field.
2. Enter a valid password in the password field.
3. Enter a different password in the confirm password field.
4. Click the register button.
Expected Result: Error message displayed indicating password mismatch.

Title: User Login
Preconditions: User is on the login page.
Test Steps:
1. Enter a valid email address in the email field.
2. Enter a valid password in the password field.
3. Click the login button.
Expected Result: User is logged in successfully and redirected to the dashboard with a success message displayed.

Title: Invalid Login Credentials
Preconditions: User is on the login page.
Test Steps:
1. Enter an invalid email address in the email field.
2. Enter a valid password in the password field.
3. Click the login button.
Expected Result: Error message displayed indicating incorrect login credentials.

Title: User Profile Access
Preconditions: User is logged in.
Test Steps: 1. Click the profile link.
Expected Result: User's profile page is displayed with their information.

Title: Event Creation
Preconditions: User is logged in.
Test Steps:
1. Click the create event button.
2. Fill in the event title, date, and location fields.
3. Click the submit button.
Expected Result: Event is created successfully and a notification is sent to the notification center.

Title: Event Participation
Preconditions: User is logged in and an event exists.
Test Steps:
1. Click the join/view event button.
2. Enter the event ID.
3. Click the join button.
Expected Result: User joins the event and a notification is sent to the notification center.

Title: Newsletter Management
Preconditions: User is logged in.
Test Steps:
1. Click the newsletter activity button.
2. Enter the newsletter content.
3. Click the send button.
Expected Result: Newsletter is sent and a notification is sent to the notification center.

Title: Database Interaction
Preconditions: User is logged in and has permission to manage project data.
Test Steps:
1. Click the project data management button.
2. Enter the project data details.
3. Click the save button.
Expected Result: Project data is saved successfully and a notification is sent to the notification center.

Title: Application Exit
Preconditions: User is logged in.
Test Steps: 1. Click the exit button.
Expected Result: Application exits and a notification is sent to the notification center.

Title: Valid Newsletter Content
Preconditions: User is logged in.
Test Steps:
1. Enter valid newsletter content.
2. Click the send button.
Expected Result: Newsletter is sent successfully and a notification is sent to the notification center.

Title: Empty Newsletter Content
Preconditions: User is logged in.
Test Steps:
1. Leave the newsletter content field empty.
2. Click the send button.
Expected Result: Error message displayed indicating empty newsletter content.

Title: Long Newsletter Content
Preconditions: User is logged in.
Test Steps:
1. Enter extremely long newsletter content.
2. Click the send button.
Expected Result: Error message displayed indicating content exceeds maximum length.

Title: Invalid Email List
Preconditions: User is logged in.
Test Data: Invalid email addresses in the recipient list.
Test Steps:
1. Enter invalid email addresses in the recipient list.
2. Click the send button.
Expected Result: Error message displayed indicating invalid email addresses.

Title: Valid Recipient List
Preconditions: User is logged in.
Test Data: Valid email addresses in the recipient list.
Test Steps:
1. Enter valid email addresses in the recipient list.
2. Click the send button.
Expected Result: Newsletter is sent successfully to the valid recipients and a notification is sent to the notification center.

Title: Notification Triggered by Registration
Preconditions: User is registered.
Test Steps: 1. A notification is triggered by the registration process.
Expected Result: Notification is sent to the appropriate actions (event creation, etc.).

Title: Notification Triggered by Login
Preconditions: User logs in.
Test Steps: 1. A notification is triggered by the login process.
Expected Result: Notification is sent to the appropriate actions (event joining/viewing, etc.).

Title: Notification Triggered by Flash Message
Preconditions: User sees a flash message.
Test Steps: 1. A flash message is sent to the notification center.
Expected Result: Notification is sent to the appropriate actions (profile access, etc.).

Title: Notification Triggered by Event Creation
Preconditions: Event is created.
Test Steps: 1. An event is created.
Expected Result: Notification is sent to the appropriate actions (joining/viewing, etc.).

Title: Notification Triggered by Event Participation
Preconditions: User joins an event.
Test Steps: 1. A user joins an event.
Expected Result: Notification is sent to the appropriate actions (profile access, etc.).

Title: Notification Triggered by Profile Access
Preconditions: User accesses their profile.
Test Steps: 1. A user accesses their profile.
Expected Result: Notification is sent to the appropriate actions (exit, etc.).

Title: Notification Triggered by Exit
Preconditions: User exits the application.
Test Steps: 1. A user exits the application.
Expected Result: Notification is sent to the appropriate actions (none, as it's the end of the session).
